prestazioni: Upgrade to a **BYD TZ220XBY (Han EV Ultra's dual-motor system)** with a **Magna PT eDS Mid+ rear motor swap** (rated at 350 kW peak, 600 Nm) paired with a **Vitesco Technologies EMIC (Electric Motor Integrated Controller)** for 0-100 km/h in 2.9s via torque vectoring firmware reflash (OEM unlock via **BYD DiLink 4.0 Pro+** with **Vector CAN FD** integration).

Installation of a **Webasto Pulse 3.0 800V/350kW liquid-cooled DC fast-charging module** with **Silicon Carbide (SiC) MOSFETs** to reduce 10-80% charge time to 8.5 minutes (from 15) while maintaining battery thermal stability via **3M Novec 7100 dielectric fluid immersion cooling** for the **BYD Blade Battery (LFP, 85.4 kWh, 1000+ cycles)**.

Fully adjustable **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way coilovers (custom valved for BYD Han L EV Ultra's 1980 kg curb weight)** with **Eibach ERS (Elite Race Series) 1200N/mm helper springs** and **MCS Remote Reservoir dampers** for Nürburgring Nordschleife lap-time optimization (target: sub-7:50). Includes **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x9.5 ET35 front, 20x11 ET45 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (265/35 R20 front, 295/30 R20 rear)** for 1.5g lateral grip.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS BYD Han L EV Ultra widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 60mm front/80mm rear fender flares) with **Vorsteiner V-FF107 front splitter** and **Seibon Carbon rear diffuser** (integrated **AEM EVOS 120mm active aerodynamics** for 120 kg downforce at 200 km/h).

**Rotiform LAS-R forged wheels (custom BYD Han EV Ultra offsets)** with **BBS LM center-lock adapters** and **Hankook Ventus S1 evo3 EV (275/30 R21 front, 315/25 R21 rear)** for track-focused aesthetics. Full **PPF (XPEL Stealth) + ceramic coating (Gyeon Quartz Ceramic Coating)** with **3M Scotchgard Paint Protection Film Pro Series** on high-impact zones.

**OLED adaptive front grille (Samsung QLED 240Hz refresh rate)** with **Anzo USA LED Projector headlights (DRLs replaced with Osram Laser+ modules)** and **Morimoto XB35 HID fog lights**. Rear features a **custom Tesla Model S Plaid-inspired taillight panel (OLED, 1200 nits)** with **Novitec Torado-style sequential turn signals** and **Valenti CNC-machined billet aluminum badges (BYD Han EV Ultra 'Twin Motor' script)**.
